fields.label: SO Item
fields.description: The Sales Order Item child row name this snapshot line was frozen from (the so_item convention used throughout this app) - not a Link, since child row names aren't independently linkable.

fields.label: Customer
fields.description: Customer of the Sales Order this line came from. Data (not a Link) so a surplus 'Buffer' row can carry the label "Buffer".

fields.label: Is Buffer
fields.description: Set on the synthetic row that holds an item's surplus Committed Prodn (Committed beyond the Sales Order lines' requirement). Shown with Customer = "Buffer".

fields.label: Dispatch Priority Date
fields.description: The Sales Order's Dispatch Priority Date (custom_updated_delivery_date, else delivery/transaction date) - the same date FGSRM uses. Allocation of consolidated Committed Prodn back to lines is ordered by this date, earliest first.

fields.label: Item Free Stock
fields.description: The item's stock-warehouse free stock (actual - reservations against Sales Orders only) frozen at draft creation. A stable per-item fact (unlike Reservable Qty, which is FIFO-allocated across whichever other lines happened to be in view).

fields.label: Suggested Prodn
fields.description: System suggestion (FGSRM logic): max(0, (Pending - Reserved) - Item Free Stock). Read-only reference.

fields.label: Committed Prodn
fields.description: The qty production commits to produce for this SO/item line. Prepopulated from Suggested Prodn and editable on the draft; independent of Suggested (never added to it). The Production Plan is built from this.

fields.label: Valuation Rate
fields.description: Item stock valuation rate (STOCK_WAREHOUSE) frozen at draft creation - the same basis as the FGSRM Production COGS card. Drives the Committed Prodn Value summary card: Committed Prodn x this rate. Buffer rows copy the item's rate. A frozen fact (copied on amend, like item_free_stock).
